eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Oceana, MI; at 7:57 AM on JUN 15, 2026 Effective until 11:57 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Kayaker missing on the White River in the Sischo Bayou area. White male 5'11" tall, 185 lbs wearing a black & red life jacket. Fluorescent green sit-on kayak with red & white cooler. If scene, call Mason-Oceana 911 Dispatch at 231-869-5858 ayaker missing on the White River in the Sischo Bayou area. White male 5'11" tall, 185 lbs wearing a black & red life jacket.
